name: Cheese Stuffed Potato Fritters
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds baking potatoes, peeled and cut into eighths
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook potatoes in boiling water to cover for 15 minutes or until tender; drain.
2. Combine potatoes and butter in a large mixing bowl; beat at medium speed with an electric mixer until smooth.
3. Add yolks and the next four ingredients, stirring well.
4. Divide the potato mixture into 10 portions. Wrap each portion around a slice of cheese; shape into an oval.
5. Dust each lightly with flour; dip in beaten egg and dredge in Italian bread crumbs.
6. Refrigerate for 20 minutes.
7. Pour oil to a depth of 4 inches in a Dutch oven; heat to 340 degrees.
8. Fry fritters a few at a time, turning once, for 8 minutes. Serve immediately.
